name: Ribs & Kraut for Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut in a collander.
2. Rinse well with cold water.
3. Squeeze excess water out by hand.
4. Place the sauerkraut in the crockpot.
5. Add 2 tablespoons flour and half cup white wine or dry vermouth to the crockpot.
6. Mix everything together with a fork.
7. Place the ribs on top of the sauerkraut mixture.
8. Season with pepper.
9. Cook on low setting for 6-12 hours, or cook on high setting for less time.
Intersting Variation - Add sliced peeled apples to the sauerkraut.
Also can substitute pork chops for ribs. May wish to brown first, if fatty.
